blurb: Leading UK-based digital campaigning organisation defending privacy, data protection and free expression online.

publications.title: Draft UK Adequacy Decision: Summary of Findings
publications.summary: ORG analysis of the European Commission's draft UK adequacy renewal under EU GDPR and LED.

publications.title: DUA Bill Amendments HoC Report Stage: ORG Statements of Support and Rationale
publications.summary: ORG statements of support for amendments to the Data Use and Access Bill at House of Commons Report Stage.

publications.title: ICO Alternative Annual Report 2023-24
publications.summary: ORG's critical perspective on the Information Commissioner's Office annual report and enforcement record.

news.title: MPs urged to vote for a Digital Sovereignty strategy
news.summary: ORG urges MPs to back an amendment to the Cyber Security and Resilience Bill requiring a Digital Sovereignty strategy for the resilience and independence of UK critical infrastructure — a concrete legislative-advocacy signal.

news.title: Online harms: Millions could be forced to use unregulated age verification
news.summary: ORG responds to the government's online-safety proposals, warning of unregulated age-verification rollout; Big Tech Programme Manager James Baker argues the government is 'playing whack-a-mole' instead of confronting structural Big Tech power.

notes: Publications page provides clear inline dates per item; used those directly. News not harvested (separate press/blog section). No controversy where ORG is a named legal party found on this page (ORG files complaints/representative actions but no named court case party listed here).
